title: Create: OneBlock
description: A modpack inspired by Shalz's YouTube series but modified to be more 'finished'
body: [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/iWCBmNTX?logo=modrinth&label=DOWNLOADS&color=2DCE89&style=for-the-badge)](https://s1a.uk/create-oneblock) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1299417829581520918?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD&color=5865F2&style=for-the-badge)](https://s1a.uk/discord) [![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-dcd4b4?style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net) ![partnership graphic for horizon hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f8c63518c4868e1391c402007d23596646cae0a.png) ───────────────────────────────────────── # The Create 6 update for Fabric 1.20.1 is out! ───────────────────────────────────────── # Create: OneBlock - A Minecraft modpack originally created by [Shalz](https://www.youtube.com/@Shalz) and modified by [samadc](https://s1a.net/) to add more cohesiveness to the experience. # [MAP DOWNLOAD] # FOR SERVERS: - For this modpack to work on a server, you need to have the modpack installed on your game and on the server. Some mods may not work on the server and cause it to crash - like sodium or sodium options. If this happens, you can get support either from your server support team or from my discord. - **I recommend Horizon Hosting, as I have used them for a while and they provide the best value to performance. Click here for more info: [here](https://s1a.uk/hrzn)** ## Embedded map info: A Minecraft map originally made by [IJAminecraft](https://ijaminecraft.com/map/oneblock/), which was adapted for 1.20.1 by [Gamerz_Riot](https://www.youtube.com/@Gamerz_Riot) and then finally modified by [samadc](https://s1a.net) for the Create mod ### Datapack information: The datapack `Create_Oneblock.zip` was the datapack modified by myself ## Disclaimer: The original datapack and all modifications made to it by IJAMinecraft and Gamerz_Riot, belong wholy to them. I claim ZERO ownership of their brilliant coding abilities.
